Official.title: Official
Official.description: An official or leader in the department.

name.description: The full name of the official.

position.description: The job title or position of the official.

group.description: The group or department section (e.g., 'Leadership', 'General Affairs').

groupDescription.description: A detailed description of the official's group or department.

order.description: The display order of the official.

Mission.title: Mission
Mission.description: A mission record for an official for a specific month.

days.description: An array of days (1-31) when the official was on mission.

notes.description: A map of day numbers to notes (e.g., { '5': 'Meeting in Battambang' }).

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The photo URL of the user.

Group.title: Group
Group.description: A category or group of officials.

description.description: A detailed description of the group.

Committee.title: Committee
Committee.description: A committee or working group assignment.

leaderName.description: The name of the leader (ឈ្មោះថ្នាក់ដឹកនាំ).

leaderPosition.description: The position of the leader (តួនាទី).

documentNumber.description: The Letter or Decision number (លេខលិខិត).

objective.description: The objective or subject (កម្មវត្ថុ).

ministry.description: The ministry or institution (ក្រសួង).

fileUrl.description: The URL to the document file (ឯកសារ).

notes.description: Other notes or details (ផ្សេងៗ).

FileStorage.title: FileStorage
FileStorage.description: Storage for files in Firestore (fallback for Storage).

name.description: The original name of the file.

type.description: The MIME type of the file.

data.description: The base64 encoded data of the file (if small enough for one doc).

size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

totalChunks.description: The total number of chunks (if stored across multiple docs).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the file was uploaded.

FileChunk.title: FileChunk
FileChunk.description: A chunk of a file stored in Firestore.

fileId.description: The ID of the parent FileStorage document.

data.description: The base64 encoded data for this chunk.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles and roles.

/files/{fileId}.description: Collection of files stored as base64 metadata.
